'''Xuaquarres''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Xuaquarres system/Legends|Xuaquarres system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was the location of both the [[Graveyard of the Dragons]] and a secret storehouse of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].

{{Planet-stub}}
